---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "A Subtitle or Paper Title"
author: "Joseph R. Loffredo"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  mit-revealjs: default
  mit-beamer: default
# quarto render template.qmd                 -> revealjs (default)
# quarto render template.qmd --to mit-beamer -> PDF
# For an offline-safe, single-file revealjs version (fonts embedded):
#   quarto render template.qmd -M embed-resources:true -M html-math-method:mathml
---

## Bullets

- First point in Neue Haas Grotesk on a white background
- Slide titles are `#750014` Roboto Serif (a maroon bar in the beamer PDF)
- Links look like this: [Quarto presentations](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/)
- Emphasize with [alert text]{.alert} — works in HTML and PDF

## Incremental Bullets

::: {.incremental}
- Appears first
- Then this
- Then this
:::

## Two Columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}
- Key result goes here
- Another supporting point
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
> A blockquote, styled with a maroon rule — useful for quotes from cases, bills, or interviews.
:::

::::

## Code and Output

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| fig-height: 4.5
plot(pressure, pch = 19, col = "#750014")
```

## Math

Vote share for candidate $c$ in district $d$:

$$
y_{cd} = \alpha_d + \beta \cdot \text{incumbency}_{cd} + \varepsilon_{cd}
$$

# Section Divider

## Main Results {#main-results}

- Headline finding one
- Headline finding two

. . .

[Estimates](#app-estimates){.button} [Robustness](#app-robustness){.button}

## A Plain Slide {.plain}

No header bar — useful for full-bleed figures or when you want a quieter look.

## Thank You! {.standout}

Joseph R. Loffredo (`loffredo@mit.edu`)

# Appendix {#appendix}

## Backup Slides {#appendix-toc}

**Main Results**: [Estimates](#app-estimates){.button} [Robustness](#app-robustness){.button}

## Full Estimates {#app-estimates}

| Model | Estimate | SE |
|-------|---------:|---:|
| OLS | 0.42 | 0.08 |
| 2SLS | 0.38 | 0.11 |

[Return](#main-results){.button} [Appendix TOC](#appendix-toc){.button}

## Robustness {#app-robustness}

- Alternative specification one
- Alternative specification two

[Return](#main-results){.button} [Appendix TOC](#appendix-toc){.button}
